channel.title: southernadventures1
channel.description: God First‚úùÔ∏è Custom Treehouse Builder southadvsbiz@gmail.com Full videos on YOUTUBE üëá

item.title: When I started this build, I planned to be on site for 3 weeks ‚...
item.description:
When I started this build, I planned to be on site for 3 weeks ‚Äî 6 days a week, 18 days of work total. Like any project of this scale, delays came with the territory. The second day alone we hit a material delay that shut things down for nearly the entire day. But every challenge got handled as it came up, and we ended up finishing in about 18.5 days ‚Äî with most of that last half day spent cleaning up and packing out. Pretty happy with that. Grateful for the opportunity to create content and build a treehouse the public can actually enjoy ‚Äî right across the street from Providence Canyon State Park at Clay Cosmos Campground!‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã BTW- The railing i usedi n this video is from Blika - their link is in my bio along with discount code Bruno10.
#treehouse #diy #fyp #tinyhouse #build
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
